title: OpenClaw inline skill-command dispatch executed tools without before-tool-call hook coverage
description: In handleInlineActions() (auto-reply inline skill-command dispatch), OpenClaw builds tools via createOpenClawTools(), applies owner-only policy, finds the dispatch tool by name, and calls tool.execute(toolCallId, toolArgs) directly. At the vulnerable revision createOpenClawTools did not wrap returned tools with the before_tool_call hook and this path performed no runBeforeToolCallHook invocation, so a skill command routed through this dispatch path ran without the same before-tool-call hook coverage (auditing/policy enforcement) applied at other tool entry points, missing hook-based policy parity for that command path.
